commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And you shall go out through the breaches, every cow straight before her; and you shall cast them into the palace, says the LORD. Breaches of the city. (Calmet) Septuagint, "naked. "Hebrew, "apart. "(Haydock) The victors shall divide you among them. (Calmet) Armon, a foreign country; some understand it of Armenia, (Challoner) and this is the general opinion. (Menochius) Septuagint, "on Mount Remmon. "Theodotion, "Mona. "Israel was removed into Armenia, "the mountain of Menni "Jeremias li.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Armon: A foreign country; some understand it of Armenia.
